summary: Iteration 2 testing: Packing Module (backend + UI) and Dispatch pagination (backend + MasterDispatch UI) fully verified. Reports.jsx page CRASHES because it wasn't updated for the new paginated /api/dispatch response shape. Backend 34/35 tests passed (1 AI-extraction test intentionally skipped).

ui_bugs.issue: Uncaught TypeError: records.map is not a function. Reports.jsx line 32-33 does setRecords(data) but /api/dispatch now returns {items,total,page,page_size,pages} instead of a list. Page crashes on load. No report-pagination / report-prev-page / report-next-page elements are present in DOM (feature claimed done but not implemented).

integration_issues.issue: Reports page fully broken; users cannot view Reports at all after 30-record seed. Export buttons unreachable while crashed.

action_items: URGENT: Fix Reports.jsx to consume paginated response. Replace `setRecords(data)` with `setRecords(data.items || []); setTotal(data.total); setPage(data.page); setPages(data.pages);` and add page state + report-pagination/report-prev-page/report-next-page controls (mirror MasterDispatch pattern).
Reports page currently 500s in browser — main agent must add page/page_size params to the load call, and reset to page=1 on filter change.
Optional UX: After clicking Load record from Packing history, automatically switch back to the New Slip tab (currently user stays on History).
critical_code_review_comments: PackingModule.jsx is 291 lines — acceptable size; well-structured.
dispatch_routes.py list_entries correctly clamps page/page_size and returns full pagination metadata — good.
Reports.jsx pagination missed entirely — regression risk from breaking /api/dispatch shape without updating all consumers.
packing_routes.py: DELETE returns 200 with message; consider 204 No Content (minor).
PackingModule reset uses EMPTY_SLIP defaults (customer_name pre-filled) — desired per design.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (updated dispatch list assertions to use .items; added TestPacking and TestDispatchPagination classes; skipped AI extraction)

success_rate.frontend: 80% (Packing + Dispatch pagination UI all pass; Reports page CRASHES)

seed_data_creation: During testing seeded 30 TEST_UI_PAGE_* dispatch entries and 1 TEST_UI_INV_00x packing slip — all cleaned up. Also removed leftover INV-TEST-PK1 packing record from main agent's curl test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dispatch pagination UI works: '30 record(s) — page 1 of 2', Next→page 2 (5 rows), Prev→page 1. Packing full CRUD, print (16 outside/32 inside slips across 2 A4 sheets each), reset, load-from-history, and dispatch-role access all verified. Reports page needs a fix for the paginated response shape before it can be UI tested. All backend endpoints confirmed working: POST/GET/DELETE /api/packing/slips (401 without auth), GET /api/dispatch returns {items,total,page,page_size:25,pages}, page=1 returns 25, page=2 returns 5 out of 30.
rca of the issue: Reports.jsx was not updated when list_entries() in dispatch_routes.py was changed from returning a list to a paginated dict. React tries records.map(...) on a plain object -> crash. MasterDispatch.jsx was properly updated (works fine). Fix: mirror MasterDispatch pagination logic in Reports.jsx.
